title: Day/Night Sounds MCCI
description: a mod that plays a sounds when it switches day/night on MCCI
body: This mod plays a sound at 500(BLOCK_BELL_USE) and 12500(ENTITY_WOLF_HOWL(<1.21.5) or ENTITY_VEX_CHARGE(1.21.5)) gametime. It uses the hostile mob audio channel. This was made so that players on MCCI fishing can get a sound alert on day/night change
